description: Control and trust layer for coordinating multiple AI agents. A local-first, open-source MCP server: durable agents, mediated coordination, scope limits (cooperative + auditable), and a real-time supervisor panel.

transport.note: Lanchu runs on the user's machine. The MCP endpoint is served at http://127.0.0.1:4319/mcp and requires a per-session bearer token issued by the launcher. There is no public endpoint by design (100% local, no phone-home).
